logger.doc:name: Start Log
logger.message: TransactionId: #[vars.transactionId], CorrelationId: #[vars.correlationId], message: "Start get covid case report flow"

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- if (!isEmpty(attributes.queryParams.state)) "SELECT COUNT(*) AS count, case_type, state FROM cvd_case_master WHERE UPPER(state) = '$(upper(attributes.queryParams.state default ''))' GROUP BY case_type, state" else "SELECT COUNT(*) AS count, case_type, state FROM cvd_case_master GROUP BY case_type, state"

logger.doc:name: End Log
logger.message: TransactionId: #[vars.transactionId], CorrelationId: #[vars.correlationId], message: "Completed get covid case report flow"

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "code":503, "message":"Service unavailable", "description":"The (upstream) service is temporarily not available", "dateTime": now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"}, "transactionId": vars.transactionId }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "code":500, "message":"Internal Server Error", "description":"The server encountered an unexpected condition which prevented it from fulfilling the request", "dateTime": now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"}, "transactionId": vars.transactionId }
